product: Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are in Beta
tagline: June 15, 2026 Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0.
what_it_does: June 15, 2026 Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0. For release notes, see [Databricks Runtime 19 (Beta)](/aws/en/release notes/runtime/19) and [Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning (Beta)](/aws/en/release notes/runtime/19ml).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.desc: June 15, 2026 Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0.
